_comment: The canonical registry of every measured number docs/benchmarks.md publishes. tests/test_benchmark_claims.py asserts the docs (and their README/wiki echoes) carry exactly these values, so a doc edit and a re-measurement can only land together; scripts/check_benchmarks.py --measure re-runs the offline-stack rows against this registry (the neural rows are pinned by the immutable sha256 release asset plus the evidence files named in source_evidence). To change a number: re-measure, update this file, the docs, and the evidence file in the same commit.

neural_ud_perseus_test.source_evidence: training/results/lemma-remeasure-2026-07-09.json (full-protocol re-measure, 2026-07-09; the lemma cell reflects the 0.32.0 lemma-composition fix, the other cells are the same run). The 2026-06 quantize-era record (training/results/v3-quantize-report.json) differs by a few hundredths on UPOS/UAS/LAS because of evaluation-path corrections since; it remains the historical record for the quantization size claims.
neural_ud_perseus_test.protocol: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); greek.evaluate_on_ud('perseus','test'); gold tokenization; CoNLL-2018 evaluator

neural_ud_proiel_test.protocol: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); greek.evaluate_on_ud('proiel','test'); out of domain (never trained on PROIEL)

neural_nt.protocol: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); greek.evaluate_on_nt(); whole Nestle 1904 NT, corrected gold

offline_baseline_ud.note: the offline stack changes with the code, so these are re-measured by scripts/check_benchmarks.py --measure (weekly CI + the pre-cut gate); the Perseus cells are an in-training upper bound by design

offline_nt_lemma.protocol: no backends active; greek.lemmatize per token via evaluate_on_nt scoring (NFC + homograph-digit clean-up)
offline_nt_lemma.doc_claim: wiki/Limitations.md states ~67% on the full NT
offline_nt_lemma.with_paradigms_note: the opt-in use_paradigms() backend (UniMorph-derived, fetched, grc-paradigms-v2) under the honesty guards (capitalized-surface skip, intra-table-ambiguity skip, rule-first ordering); evidence: training/results/paradigms-guards-2026-07-11.json; the base row stays the no-backends protocol

throughput_cpu.note: development machine, plain CPU, sentence-length dependent; the quantized MatMulNBits kernels trade CPU throughput for the 3x size win. Hardware-dependent and illustrative, NOT a pinned benchmark like the accuracy rows: check_benchmarks.py does not re-measure it (CI runners differ). Stated in docs/benchmarks.md and wiki/Greek-NLP.md. Dependency-drift trigger: re-measure on the same machine class only when the grc-joint model or the onnxruntime floor changes.

bootstrap.note: greek.bootstrap_ud's default; docs/benchmarks.md states the same so the reproduction command matches

out_of_domain_lead.note: ~23 = round(82.48 - 59.00); the cited Perseus-trained baseline is Stanza-perseus (OdyCy paper)

calibration_ece.protocol: temperature fitted on the UD Perseus DEV fold only (the checkpoint-selection fold); test ECE is report-only, one shot; 15-bin equal-width ECE; CPU, batch_size=32; the lemma head calibrates the argmax-script probability against composed-lemma-vs-gold correctness (a documented proxy)
calibration_ece.note: the shipped bundled calibration (src/aegean/data/bundled/greek/calibration.json) carries exactly these temperatures; confidence is exposed ONLY through this calibration, never raw softmax; fitted on literary prose (the genre caveat travels with the number)

proiel_convention_decomposition.protocol: greek.proiel_convention_report(); UD-PROIEL test, neural pipeline, decomposition of the published UFeats/UAS/LAS rows (reproduces the official evaluator to 4 decimals); measurement only — the published rows are unchanged

neural_papygreek_test.protocol: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); greek.evaluate_on_papygreek(); documentary Koine, out of domain, scheme-matched (AGDT->UD, the training convention); CPU sequential; fold papygreek-fold-v3

documentary_reconciliation.note: opt-in Lever A, conservative coordinator reconciliation (use_documentary_reconciliation); only UPOS/XPOS move, every other metric byte-identical to the baseline run

documentary_full.note: opt-in Levers A+B (reconciliation + lemma OOV rescue with use_paradigms; the rescue is seed+paradigm only, ending rules excluded by measurement)

orig_layer.note: the diplomatic-orthography surface of the SAME sentences and gold (papygreek-fold-orig); the delta vs the reg row isolates the cost of the scribes' non-standard documentary usage (spelling and a minority of morphosyntactic regularizations)

papygreek_convention_decomposition.protocol: greek.papygreek_convention_report(); papygreek-fold-v2, neural pipeline, CPU sequential (batching is not prediction-identical on this fold); reproduces the official evaluator exactly; measurement only, the published row is unchanged

procrustes_null.protocol: aegean.analysis.rank_known_pairs(la, lb, shared_label_anchors(la, lb), leave_one_out=True); source = bundled Linear A sign_embeddings; target = DAMOS Linear B sign_embeddings restricted to the 74 canonical syllabograms; dim=50, window=1; pure-Python deterministic; identity floor = recover_identity(la, anchor_fraction=1.0)
procrustes_null.note: EXPLORATORY negative result: distributional embedding alignment recovers NO Linear A -> Linear B correspondence at this corpus scale (top-1 0.000, top-5 at chance, median far short of recovery), while self-alignment recovers 90.1% (the 16 misses are distributional twins). The module ships as the instrument that measured this null; every output is exploratory-labelled.

neural_verse_test.note: small-sample genre-conditioned datapoint (wide bootstrap CIs), never a headline number; a leakage-clean tragedy evaluation (no prior one is known to us); the fold is tragedy-only since v2 (the sliver once labeled hexameter was the Maximus prose paraphrase and was removed)
neural_verse_test.protocol: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); greek.evaluate_on_verse(track='tragedy'); verse fold verse-fold-v2 (Euripides Bacchae 1-169, tragedy-only), out of domain, scheme-matched (AGDT->UD); CPU sequential

neural_dbbe_test.note: tagging only (the gold has no trees); Byzantine book epigrams, unedited scribal orthography; DBBE tagset mapped to UPOS; lemma scored against normalized Attic headwords
neural_dbbe_test.protocol: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); greek.evaluate_on_dbbe(); CPU sequential; fold dbbe-lingann-fold-v2
